contextBlurb: New Jersey has 12 bills tracked in 2025–2026. 1 relates to moratoriums or prohibitions. 1 offers incentives or exemptions.

legislation.title: Requires data center owners and operators to submit semi-annual water and energy usage reports to BPU.
legislation.summary: Requires data center owners and operators to submit semi-annual water and energy usage reports to BPU.

legislation.title: Establishes Artificial Intelligence Apprenticeship Program and artificial intelligence apprenticeship tax credit program.
legislation.summary: Establishes Artificial Intelligence Apprenticeship Program and artificial intelligence apprenticeship tax credit program.

legislation.title: Provides civil penalties for campaign advertisements containing "deepfake" misrepresentations of candidates.
legislation.summary: Provides civil penalties for campaign advertisements containing "deepfake" misrepresentations of candidates.

legislation.title: Requires AG to study law enforcement use of facial recognition technology and issue report with recommendations for Statewide policy.
legislation.summary: Requires AG to study law enforcement use of facial recognition technology and issue report with recommendations for Statewide policy.

legislation.title: Establishes certain data privacy protection requirements for consumer health data, health care providers, and patients.
legislation.summary: Establishes certain data privacy protection requirements for consumer health data, health care providers, and patients.

legislation.summary: Establishes certain data privacy protection requirements for consumer health data, health care providers, and patients.

legislation.title: Requires vehicle manufacturers to provide real-time access to motor vehicle data to vehicle owners and representatives.
legislation.summary: Requires vehicle manufacturers to provide real-time access to motor vehicle data to vehicle owners and representatives.

legislation.title: Requires registration of data brokers and prohibits brokering of certain health records.
legislation.summary: Requires registration of data brokers and prohibits brokering of certain health records.
